title: alstroemeria umbellata
intro: Alstroemeria umbellata, also known as the South American Peruvian Lily, is a plant species that belongs to the Alstroemeria genus and is native to South America. The medicinal properties of Alstroemeria umbellata include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with the plant include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. Herbal preparations of Alstroemeria umbellata can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues, wounds, and respiratory problems.
